entries.final_answer: Option C: Block with error on any charter subcommand that reads the bundle; spec-kitty upgrade applies the registered migration in-place. No new migrate-bundle command. Tests cover both the reader block and the upgrade migration path.
options: auto-migrate on spec-kitty upgrade (same pattern as project schema_version migrations)
block with error and add spec-kitty charter migrate-bundle command
block with error on any charter subcommand that touches the bundle, migration via spec-kitty upgrade
entries.question: When the CLI encounters a charter bundle whose integer schema_version is outside the supported range, how should migration work?
